description: Add advanced error handling, retry policies, X-Ray tracing, CloudWatch alarms, and observability to the CDK stack following strict TDD - write failing tests first, then implement.
steps: Step 1: Write failing tests in test/cdk-base.test.ts for advanced error handling. Add a new describe('Advanced Error Handling') block that asserts: (a) the state machine definition contains specific error type catches (States.TaskFailed, Lambda.ServiceException, Lambda.SdkClientException) on the Process Audio task, (b) the Polly task catches Polly-specific errors, (c) the Write Metadata and Update Status DynamoDB tasks have Catch blocks routing to the Mark Failed state, (d) error paths include error context in the notification message (error type and cause).

Step 2: Write failing tests for retry policies. Add a describe('Retry Policies') block asserting: (a) Process Audio (Lambda) task has retry configuration with exponential backoff (IntervalSeconds, MaxAttempts, BackoffRate), (b) Synthesize Speech (Polly) task has retry configuration, (c) Write Metadata and Update Status (DynamoDB) tasks have retry configuration, (d) verify specific retry parameters (MaxAttempts <= 3, BackoffRate of 2.0).

Step 3: Write failing tests for X-Ray tracing. Add a describe('Observability - X-Ray Tracing') block asserting: (a) the Lambda function has TracingConfig Mode set to Active, (b) the state machine has TracingConfiguration Enabled set to true.

Step 4: Write failing tests for CloudWatch Alarms. Add a describe('CloudWatch Alarms') block asserting: (a) a CloudWatch Alarm exists for state machine execution failures (metric: ExecutionsFailed), (b) a CloudWatch Alarm exists for Lambda function errors (metric: Errors), (c) alarms have appropriate thresholds and evaluation periods.

Step 5: Implement advanced error handling in lib/cdk-base-stack.ts. Add Catch blocks with specific error types to processAudioTask (catching Lambda.ServiceException, Lambda.SdkClientException, States.TaskFailed), pollySynthesizeTask (catching States.TaskFailed), and add Catch blocks to writeMetadataTask and updateStatusTask routing to markFailedTask with resultPath $.errorInfo.

Step 6: Implement retry policies in lib/cdk-base-stack.ts. Add retry configuration to: processAudioTask (errors: [States.TaskFailed, Lambda.ServiceException], interval: 2s, maxAttempts: 3, backoffRate: 2.0), pollySynthesizeTask (errors: [States.TaskFailed], interval: 3s, maxAttempts: 2, backoffRate: 2.0), writeMetadataTask and updateStatusTask (errors: [States.ALL], interval: 1s, maxAttempts: 3, backoffRate: 2.0).
Step 7: Implement X-Ray tracing in lib/cdk-base-stack.ts. Enable tracing on the Lambda function (tracing: lambda.Tracing.ACTIVE) and on the state machine (tracingEnabled: true).

Step 8: Implement CloudWatch Alarms in lib/cdk-base-stack.ts. Add CloudWatch alarms: (a) StateMachine execution failures alarm using stateMachine.metricFailed() with threshold 1 and evaluation period of 1 minute over 5 minutes, (b) Lambda errors alarm using audioProcessorFunction.metricErrors() with threshold 1 and evaluation period of 1 minute over 5 minutes.
Step 9: Update the Lambda handler in lambda/audio-processor/index.ts to use structured JSON logging with requestId, status fields, and timestamps. Replace console.log with structured JSON format.
Step 10: Run NODE_OPTIONS="" npx jest --no-cache -u to update snapshots and verify all tests pass.
Step 11: Run NODE_OPTIONS="" npx cdk synth to verify synthesis succeeds.

Step 12: Update ARCHITECTURE.md - add an 'Error Handling & Retry Strategy' section documenting the retry policies (which tasks, intervals, max attempts, backoff rates), specific error types caught, and update the Mermaid diagram to show retry loops and X-Ray/CloudWatch integration. Add an 'Observability' section documenting X-Ray tracing, structured logging, and CloudWatch alarms.
acceptance_criteria: All new tests pass (retry policies, error handling, X-Ray tracing, CloudWatch alarms)
processAudioTask has retry configuration with MaxAttempts 3, BackoffRate 2.0
pollySynthesizeTask has retry configuration with MaxAttempts 2, BackoffRate 2.0
DynamoDB tasks (writeMetadata, updateStatus) have retry configuration
All task states have Catch blocks routing errors to Mark Failed
Lambda function has X-Ray tracing enabled (TracingConfig Active)
CloudWatch Alarm exists for state machine execution failures
CloudWatch Alarm exists for Lambda errors
Lambda handler uses structured JSON logging
NODE_OPTIONS="" npx jest --no-cache passes all tests including updated snapshot
ARCHITECTURE.md is updated with error handling strategy, retry policies, and observability details
Existing 67 tests continue to pass (no regressions)
IAM least-privilege test still passes (no new wildcard resources except documented exceptions)
findings: X-Ray tracing on Lambda adds xray:PutTraceSegments and xray:PutTelemetryRecords IAM permissions with wildcard Resource - added as documented exception in IAM least-privilege test. CDK LambdaInvoke automatically adds default retry config for Lambda-specific transient errors (Lambda.ClientExecutionTimeoutException, Lambda.ServiceException, Lambda.AWSLambdaException, Lambda.SdkClientException) in addition to any custom retry added via addRetry(). Retry test regex patterns needed to account for multiple retry entries in the array. The Catch errors parameter specifies which error types trigger the catch - for Polly we use States.TaskFailed, for Lambda we use specific Lambda error types.
